note: EXIF Orientation is a tiny procedural module: two core hooks plus a rotate helper, no config/permissions/plugins. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) probing documented facts (automatic vs image-effect, which EXIF values map to which rotation, requirements) an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site I installed the exif_orientation module. Do I need to add an image effect to an image style, or does it rotate uploaded images automatically? How does it hook in?
must_not_contain: add the image effect to the style
evals.expected_output: It is automatic — no image effect needed. It implements hook_file_presave() and rotates the stored file on save/upload; there is no config UI.

evals.prompt: In the exif_orientation module, which EXIF Orientation tag values are corrected and how many degrees does each rotate? What about mirrored/flipped values?
evals.expected_output: Orientation 3 -> 180 degrees, 6 -> 90 degrees, 8 -> 270 degrees. Value 1/missing/other is left alone; odd/mirrored (flipped) values are NOT corrected.

evals.prompt: Which image MIME types does the exif_orientation module rotate, and what PHP requirement must be met for it to work?
evals.expected_output: Only image/jpeg and image/png are processed, and PHP's EXIF extension (exif_read_data()) must be available or the module no-ops.

evals.prompt: Why do phone photos (e.g. iPhone) show up sideways in Drupal, and how does exif_orientation fix it at upload?
evals.expected_output: Phones save images in landscape and record display rotation in the EXIF Orientation tag, which browsers/toolkits ignore. exif_orientation reads that tag on file presave and physically rotates the stored file so it is upright.

evals.prompt: In exif_orientation, why does the module insert its own upload validator before file_validate_image_resolution on image widgets?
evals.expected_output: file_validate_image_resolution may resize the image and lose the EXIF data; exif_orientation prepends exif_orientation_validate_image_rotation so rotation happens before any resize strips the EXIF.

evals.prompt: What configuration, settings form, or permissions does the exif_orientation module provide, and how do I set it up?
evals.expected_output: None — no config UI, no settings, no permissions, no image effect. Setup is simply enabling the module (drush en exif_orientation -y).

evals.prompt: In PHP on Drupal 11, how can I make exif_orientation re-check and rotate an existing image file entity? Is there a public service?
evals.expected_output: There is no public service; saving the file entity (File::load($fid)->save()) fires hook_file_presave() which runs the rotation. The _exif_orientation_rotate() helper is private.
